doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Revision (Increase) of Dividend Forecast for FY3/26 (157th fiscal year)

key_facts.reason_jp: 当期純利益が過去最高を達成するなど業績が想定を上回る水準で推移

summary_en: Interim dividend raised to ¥90/share (from ¥70), final dividend to ¥160/share (from ¥70), totalling ¥250/share for FY3/26. Increase driven by net income exceeding expectations and reaching record levels. Company maintains progressive dividend policy and 50%+ total payout ratio target.
summary_jp: FY3/26中間配当¥90/株（前回¥70）、期末¥160/株（前回¥70）に増配、年間¥250/株。当期純利益が過去最高を達成し想定超過が増配理由。累進配当方針と還元性向50%以上を維持。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - FY3/26 interim ¥90/share (prev. ¥70), final ¥160/share (prev. ¥70) - Annual ¥250/share - Progressive policy, 50%+ payout ratio target
tag_jp: 増配 - FY3/26中間配当 ¥90/株（前回¥70）、期末¥160/株（前回¥70）- 年間¥250/株 - 累進配当方針、還元性向50%以上
